name: ticketing-system
description: High-performance ticketing system with Node.js clustering, Redis Redlock, MySQL, JWT auth, and rate limiting

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=auth-service" "npm run dev --workspace=ticket-service"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=api-gateway" "npm run start --workspace=auth-service" "npm run start --workspace=ticket-service"
scripts.migrate: npm run migrate --workspace=ticket-service && npm run migrate --workspace=auth-service
